flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 47% at University of Puerto Rico-Rio Piedras vs the 2003–2007 baseline (8.7k vs 16.4k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Puerto Rico-Rio Piedras fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (16.2% → 11.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Puerto Rico-Rio Piedras fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).
